ground_truth.title: Graphic Design Courses - Visual Communication | 2025 | Domestika
ground_truth.main_content:
Online Graphic Design courses - Master graphic design with our courses. Learn to create impactful visual communication and designs. Start your journey in graphic design today!

Featured courses include: Canva for Beginners: Create Professional Designs, Specialization in Graphic Design and Visual Communication, Instagram Feed Design with Canva, Introduction to Adobe Illustrator, Introduction to Adobe Photoshop, Master Figma from 0 to 100, Canva and Artificial Intelligence: Design an Original Brand and Product Catalog, Graphic Design for Beginners, Design a personalized and interactive tarot deck using Artificial Intelligence, Logo Design: From Concept to Presentation, Art Direction for Creative Visual Branding, AI for Motion Designers: Getting Started with Generative Tools, Adobe Illustrator for Graphic Design, Introduction to Affinity Designer, Creation of an Original Logo from Scratch.

Each course is taught by leading professionals and includes student reviews and enrollment numbers.
with: Master graphic design with our courses. Learn to create impactful visual communication and designs.
Canva for Beginners: Create Professional Designs - A course by Clàudia Cánovas
Specialization in Graphic Design and Visual Communication - Master's in Graphic Design: Master color, composition, and visual perception
Introduction to Adobe Illustrator - Learn Adobe Illustrator and create optimum vector graphics without any prior knowledge
Introduction to Adobe Photoshop - Learn Adobe Photoshop from scratch and master the best software for treatment, retouching
